proposed_relations.description: Bus Lanes featured as an SBS feature on the Nostrand/Rogers corridor

proposed_relations.description: Pre-Payment (off-board fare collection) featured as an SBS feature on the Nostrand/Rogers corridor

evidence_refs.source_quote: A photograph of a person standing at a pre-payment kiosk at a bus stop. The kiosk is blue and has a screen and a coin slot. There are other people and a bus stop shelter in the background.
Pre-Payment

1. Pay before you board by dipping MetroCard at sidewalk MetroCard machine or inserting coins at sidewalk coin machine 2. Take your proof of payment receipt 3. Enter through front or rear door of bus – no need to show receipt to the driver

decisions.rationale: Page 3 SBS Features and dedicated page 4 'How Pre-Payment Works' clearly present pre-payment as a treatment of the SBS project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: A photograph of a person standing at a pre-payment kiosk at a bus stop. The kiosk is blue and has a screen and a coin slot. There are other people and a bus stop shelter in the background.

proposed_relations.description: SBS Stations featured as an SBS feature on the Nostrand/Rogers corridor

evidence_refs.source_quote: A photograph of a bus stop shelter. A person is waiting inside the shelter, which has a glass wall. There are posters on the shelter, including one that says "Llama sin usar".
Stations

Local Bus Stop at curb New Shelter Fare Collection Machines Bus Bulb: Sidewalks at SBS stations will extend out to the bus lane. Buses will not need to pull in and out of traffic. Higher curbs on the SBS platform will allow for easier boarding.

decisions.rationale: Page 3 SBS Features and page 8 Empire Blvd SBS Station detail explicitly present SBS stations as a treatment.

proposed_relations.description: Fare Enforcement (Eagle Team) as part of Pre-Payment system on Nostrand/Rogers SBS

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Inspector teams conduct random checks of buses • $100 fine for passengers without a receipt • Fare evasion on Bx12 SBS and M15 SBS declined after pre-payment introduced

A photograph showing two NYCT Eagle Team officers in dark blue uniforms with 'NYCT' on the back, standing next to a white and blue bus. The bus has '+selectbuservice' written on its side. A label 'NYCT Eagle Team' is positioned above the officers. The bus is parked on a sidewalk, and the scene is outdoors during the day.

decisions.rationale: Page 5 'How Pre-Payment Works: Enforcement' is part of the same SBS presentation and describes fare enforcement as a treatment component.
